positive: A stylized, retro-futuristic cosmic explorer traversing a vivid landscape of floating geometric islands and pastel nebulas. The main subject is a small, whimsical spacecraft leaving a glowing trail of interstellar dust. Use a clean, heavy silhouette style reminiscent of mid-century pulp sci-fi art. Composition should be centrally focused and highly symmetrical for maximum print impact. Color palette: deep indigo, vibrant teal, coral pink, and creamy yellow. Strong, crisp outlines, high contrast, clean lines, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Minimal background clutter, vibrant energy flow, perfect for repeat pattern or single print placement.
negative: blurry, amateur, text, watermark, logo, signature, disfigured, deformed, multiple subjects, low contrast, grainy, noise, realistic photography, excessive detail, cartoonish (if too messy), poorly drawn hands, artifacts
